---
title: "getstarted"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{getstarted}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(ansperf)
```

Initial vignette skeleton initiated with usethis::use_vignette("nameofvignette").

This package is cool.
